KXWC1H-26JUN11KORCZE-KOR.title: Will Republic of Korea win the 1st Half?

144300625.name: Player to have over 0.5 shots on target

134484756.name: Second half South Korea over/under 0.5 goals

841314ca-dd2b-4024-98d3-6b7a565f25ad.question: Will Son Heung-min score a goal (excluding own goals)?
841314ca-dd2b-4024-98d3-6b7a565f25ad.method: Three sources converge: Kalshi SOA-minus-assist decomposition = 0.253; Polymarket tournament-wide 74.5% over ~3-4 group matches implies per-match ~0.25-0.30; Smarkets 'Anytime goalscorer' direct mid = 0.315. Averaged/rounded to 0.28.

9479126a-6f7a-4617-8dd5-9404e7d7c023.question: Will Patrik Schick have at least 1 shot on target?
9479126a-6f7a-4617-8dd5-9404e7d7c023.method: Smarkets 'Player to have over 0.5 shots on target' direct mid (bid 0.565 / ask 0.633). Wide spread (illiquid) -- single source only.

93b14829-1e24-4d3b-bfdd-cddc0bfce74b.question: Will a penalty kick be awarded in the match?
93b14829-1e24-4d3b-bfdd-cddc0bfce74b.method: Smarkets 'Penalty to be awarded - Yes' direct mid (bid 0.3125 / ask 0.3333). Single source, but consistent with typical base rates (~0.25-0.30 per match).

0e157f1d-fc6e-42f6-82c6-90529ac15f32.question: Will South Korea score in the second half?
0e157f1d-fc6e-42f6-82c6-90529ac15f32.method: Smarkets 'Second half South Korea over/under 0.5 goals - Over' direct mid (bid 0.4808 / ask 0.5291). Single source.

b7995310-71f3-4a96-a11b-1332843d65b9.question: At halftime, will Czechia have more corner kicks than South Korea?
b7995310-71f3-4a96-a11b-1332843d65b9.method: Kalshi full-match corner totals show KOR generates more corners than CZE (5+ corners: 54.5% vs 39%). Directional signal only -- full match not halftime, treat as weak prior shaded below 50%.

e7d19c59-aa0a-42b7-afe9-5db6ab9e601c.question: Will South Korea win the match?
e7d19c59-aa0a-42b7-afe9-5db6ab9e601c.note: Three independent sources converge near 37% -- corroborates the downward adjustment from our raw model's 46%.
